pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script uses this path to create the VeraCrypt volume.
task.json, setup_task.sh and export_result.sh all specify this as the required mount point.
export_result.sh verifies the existence and content of the report at this path.
setup_task.sh generates exactly these three files inside the volume.
setup_task.sh writes the checksums to this file, and export_result.sh reads from it.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated files ('project_ssh_config', 'infrastructure_hosts', 'quarterly_metrics.csv') inserted into a VeraCrypt volume at '/home/ga/Volumes/corrupted_volume.hc'. The ground truth checksums are written to '/var/lib/veracrypt_task_data/expected_checksums.txt' via the setup script.
